home.heroTitle: Grow Your Business Faster with Smart Messaging & CRM Automation
home.heroSubtitle: All-in-one WhatsApp Business API platform with built-in CRM, bulk messaging, campaign automation, and team inbox — designed for sales, support, and marketing teams.
home.featuresTitle: One platform. Every tool you need.
home.featuresSubtitle: Replace scattered tools with one WhatsApp-first workspace: unified inbox, CRM, campaigns, templates, workflows, and business tools — so your team moves faster together.
home.pricingSubtitle: Starter workspace from ₹999/mo or ₹10,999/yr (indicative). Full tiers and trials on the live product.
home.planMonthlyHint: Indicative starter limits below. 11-day free trial, free setup, and cancel anytime on notifyy.io.
home.planYearlyHint: Save vs. paying monthly — same indicative limits; confirm current offers on notifyy.io.
home.pricingTrialNote: Free 11-day trial · Free setup · Cancel anytime. Live pricing: notifyy.io/pricing

stats.open: WhatsApp open rate vs ~20% on email
stats.extratools: Extra tools needed — inbox, CRM & campaigns built in

pillars.api: Fragmented inbox, CRM, and campaign tools slow teams down. Notifyy unifies WhatsApp messaging, lead tracking, and automation in one dashboard.
pillars.growth: Send bulk personalized campaigns, automate follow-ups, and manage Meta-approved templates — without juggling spreadsheets and separate apps.
pillars.ops: Built for reliability: scalable cloud infra, delivery and read visibility, and analytics so support and sales leaders see what’s working.

home.videoSubtitle: Walkthrough of inbox, CRM, campaigns, and automation — same flows you’ll configure from our guides.

search.hint: Navigate with ↑ ↓ · Enter to open · Esc to close

replies.start: Create a Notifyy workspace, connect your WhatsApp Business Account, verify your display name, and submit templates for marketing or utility. Then import contacts and launch your first campaign from Campaigns → New campaign. See **Getting started** for the full checklist.
replies.pricing: The live product offers a free 11-day trial (cancel anytime) and starter workspace plans from ₹999/mo or ₹10,999/yr — confirm on notifyy.io/pricing. WhatsApp also bills per conversation: marketing ₹0.8631; utility/authentication ₹0.115. See Pricing for tables and FAQs.
replies.features: Notifyy combines a multi-channel team inbox, built-in CRM, WhatsApp campaign manager, template builder, no-code workflows, and business tools (widget, QR, opt-in). Open **Product features** in the sidebar for deep dives.
replies.default: I can help with getting started, pricing, and feature overviews. Try a suggestion chip or browse the sidebar — all answers are from the Notifyy documentation.

seo.homeTitle: Notifyy Docs — WhatsApp Business & CRM Platform
seo.homeDesc: Official Meta Tech Provider. WhatsApp API, CRM, campaigns, templates, workflows, and team inbox. Free 11-day trial on notifyy.io. Docs and guides.
